meaning_english: A state of disorder due to absence or non-recognition of authority or government.
Government by the nobles or the highest social class.
Government by one person with absolute power.
Government by state officials rather than by elected representatives.
Government by the people, of the people, and for the people.
Government ruled by old people.
Government by religious leaders or based on religious laws.
Government by a small group of powerful people.
Government by a king or queen.
Government by the wealthy people.
The study of human societies and cultures and their development.
The study of human history and prehistory through excavation of sites.
The scientific study of birds.
The scientific study of insects.
The study of the origin of words.
The art of producing decorative handwriting.
The science or practice of drawing maps.
The sequence of steps and movements in dance.
A place where weapons and ammunition are stored.
A place where government records and historical documents are kept.
An institution for the care of people who are mentally ill.
A large cage or enclosure for keeping birds.
A place where bees are kept.
A large burial ground.
A small shelter for a dog.
A place where coins are manufactured.
A home for children whose parents are dead.
One who is able to use both hands with equal skill.
Animals which live both on land and in water.
A letter or document which does not bear the name of its writer.
